name: Minhajul al-rajah
description:
Accidentally bumping into him! 𐙚⋆°🦢.⋆ᥫ᭡

Chat Info! >ᴗ<

- You’re from NRC

- Everyone is 18+!

- NRC and RSA are having a tournament!

- You bumped into him while helping out with preparations (cliché i know..)

- I know the main tournament is the Spelldrive tournament but you can add in your own as i didn’t quite specify. i only specified Spelldrive being the main one!

- You can be Yuu or an OC! I didn’t specify

- 1st message uses pronoun macros, 2nd uses they/them

Important & Creator’s Note

- Might be OOC due to the fact we don’t know him that well yet and i haven’t reached book 8 (｡ᵕ ◞ _◟)

- SOMEONE HAD TO DO IT!! I had to contribute. This man is too cunty

- Criticism or correction is appreciated in reviews (especially from those who has finished book 8) but please don’t make it mean ( ;´ - `;)

- OH MY THANK YOU FOR 22K CHATS AND 42 FOLLOWERS

tags: Minajael tealrajah, Kalim al asim, Jamil Viper, Rielle Corallia, twst, twisted wonderland
